template:
Topic: {{topic}}
Core Insight: {{core_insight}}
Visual Style: {{style}}

Please act as a minimalist information designer. I need you to come up with three visual diagram concepts that use only simple geometric shapes (circles, squares, lines, arrows) to express a core idea.

For each concept, provide:

1. Left / Top Visual (Before / Amateur)
Represents the common mistake, starting point, or flawed state.

Describe what the shapes look like
Include a short label (1–2 words)

2. Right / Bottom Visual (After / Pro)
Represents the ideal state, improved system, or desired outcome.

Describe what the shapes look like
Include a short label

3. AI Image Generation Prompt
Provide an English prompt that can be directly used in tools like Midjourney, DALL·E, or Gemini to generate the diagram.

Include style keywords: minimalist line art, flat design, {{style}}, simple vector diagram

Fill-in Guide:

[TOPIC]: The subject of the content
(e.g., [TOPIC])
[CORE_INSIGHT]: The key takeaway or conclusion
(e.g., Doing three things at once cancels progress; focusing on one leads to breakthroughs.)
